key_finding: K > V IS UNIVERSAL ACROSS ALL POSITION BANDS. Disconfirmatory challenge SURVIVED. K-only at early 5%: 0% acc / 10.5% text (destroys everything). V-only at early 5%: 100% acc / 92.8% text (completely dispensable). V-K gap: early=+100pp, mid=+94pp, late=+66pp. Gap is LARGEST at infrastructure positions. V-only has ZERO answer effect at early/mid (100/100 correct). Energy ratio K/V = 6.4x is identical at all position bands — no confound.
evidence_impact: Disconfirmatory challenge to K>V universality SURVIVED and STRENGTHENED the claim. The routing > throughput hierarchy extends to the entire KV cache. Position determines WHAT K routing controls (infrastructure vs answer-specific) but not WHETHER it matters. V content is dispensable at all positions for answer accuracy. This is the strongest confirmation of the K-V functional dissociation.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Replicate position x K-V on Qwen (cross-model). (2) SNR-matched K>V on Qwen. (3) Third model family for K-V dissociation. (4) K-only PGD (exploit K-direction null space). (5) V-only at larger fractions (10-20%) at early positions.

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG: universal across models. Late positions carry answer info via K-routing

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation UNIVERSAL across ALL POSITIONS. K>V at early(+100pp), mid(+94pp), late(+66pp). Energy-confound-tested

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. R-KV shows removing redundant tokens IMPROVES reasoning

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE dose-response on 2 families + energy confound test. V-mag immunity 149/149. K-V direction ratio 3.6-3.7x. Need 3rd family

encoding_strategy.status: Digital (Qwen: K+V cliffs) vs analog (Llama: K+V gradual). Position x K-V interaction: K>V at ALL positions on Llama

superadditive_interaction.status: Llama-specific (7.9-16.8x). Weak on Qwen (1.1-2.0x). Explained by staggered vs overlapping degradation windows

literature_convergence.status: 5+ independent groups converge. K-V dissociation is novel contribution beyond existing literature. Energy-confound and position-universality tested
